ext.description: Lint commit messages against bundled commitlint templates (Conventional, PHP/Laravel, Node, Python). Right-click a folder or use the sidebar tree view to scaffold a config; run the CLI check on the last commit from the palette or the sidebar.
view.container.title: Commit Lint
view.templates.name: Templates
config.checkLastCommit.command: Shell command run by 'Check Last Commit Message' in a workspace terminal. Defaults to `npx --yes commitlint --from HEAD~1 --to HEAD --verbose`.
cmd.addTemplate: Vibecode - Add Custom Commit Lint Template
cmd.initFromTemplate: Vibecode - Init Commit Lint From Template
